Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 14/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E83
Successful Prediction

Enhancement: 1
Every 8 sec., the opposing fighter with the highest damage receives 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% more damage for 3 sec. During this time, when attacking, the owner of the engraving additionally deals pure damage to this fighter in the amount of 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% of their attack.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
Every 8 sec. 2 enemy fighters with the highest damage receive 20% / 21% / 20% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% more damage for 3 sec. During this time, when attacking, the owner of the engraving additionally deals these fighters pure damage equal to 90% / 91% / 92% / 93% / 95% / 97% / 100% of their attack. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce incoming damage.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
Every 8 sec. 3 enemy fighters with the highest damage receive 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% more damage for 4 sec. During this time, when attacking, the engraving owner additionally deals these fighters pure damage equal to 140% / 141% / 142% / 143% / 145% / 147% / 150% of their attack. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce incoming damage. Also, if these enemy fighters die within 4 sec. after the ability is triggered, they cannot be resurrected for 3 sec., and the engraving owner will restore 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% health.
